dialogueChunks.intro: They are free, {player_name}. You did it. The {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} safe, and the {quest_threat} {quest_threat_has} been driven off for good.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I saw faces I thought I would never see again walking back through our gates. The {quest_focus} no longer holds any power over us. {quest_ally} is helping everyone settle back in.
dialogueChunks.outro: You brought our people home. That is a debt beyond measure.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, against all odds you managed to {quest_action}. The {quest_stakes} {quest_stakes_is} back with us.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The healers are tending to them now. It will take time, but they will recover. The {quest_threat} scattered when they saw you coming: I doubt they will try this again.
dialogueChunks.outro: You risked your life for strangers. That kind of courage is rare.

dialogueChunks.intro: Freedom. That is what you gave them, {player_name}. The {quest_stakes} walked out of the {quest_focus} alive because of you.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {quest_threat} {quest_threat_has} been broken. What was once a place of despair is now just rubble and bad memories. {quest_ally} says the rescued are already asking for you by name.
dialogueChunks.outro: You did something extraordinary today. This settlement will never forget it.
